meaning: n.药物,治疗法,补救,赔偿vt.治疗,补救,矫正,修缮,修补
examples: There is no simple remedy for unemployment.
Their remedy lay within the range of existent technology.
Your only remedy is to go to law.
Likewise a fiscal remedy like a massive tax cut is unrealistic in the face of the current deficit.
S.A. 54:49-14(c) leaves individuals without an effective remedy for the overpayment of sales tax.
